'''Hole balls''' were wild creatures that lived on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. They were small animals whose fur were always covered in debris to provide camouflage. They dug many holes, which they hid in when they were frightened. Hole balls made squeaking sounds.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
